full_text:
Sheng Xian (Xiaozhang) 盛憲 (孝章)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sheng Xian (盛憲), styledXiaozhang (孝章), was born in Kuaiji. Helped in resistance to Sun Ce, had quite a reputation. Killed by Sun Quan. Sheng Xian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Sheng Xian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
